records.question: Which papers include Aaron Turon as an author in position 2 or higher?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT papers.paperid FROM papers
JOIN authorship ON papers.paperid = authorship.paperid
JOIN authors ON authorship.authid = authors.authid
WHERE authors.fname = 'Aaron' AND authors.lname = 'Turon' AND authorship.authorder >= 2
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT p.paperID
FROM Papers p
JOIN Authorship a ON p.paperID = a.paperID
JOIN Authors au ON a.authID = au.authID
WHERE a.authOrder >= 2
  AND au.fname = 'Aaron'
  AND au.lname = 'Turon'

records.question: What papers have Atsushi Ohori as an author with an authorship order of at most 1?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT papers.paperid FROM papers
JOIN authorship ON papers.paperid = authorship.paperid
JOIN authors ON authorship.authid = authors.authid
WHERE authors.fname = 'Atsushi' AND authorship.authorder <= 1 AND authors.lname = 'Ohori'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT Papers.paperID
FROM Papers
JOIN Authorship ON Papers.paperID = Authorship.paperID
JOIN Authors ON Authorship.authID = Authors.authID
WHERE Authorship.authOrder <= 1
  AND Authors.fname = 'Atsushi'
  AND Authors.lname = 'Ohori'

records.question: Which papers have an author listed exactly as number 2 in the author order?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT papers.paperid FROM papers
JOIN authorship ON papers.paperid = authorship.paperid
WHERE authorship.authorder = 2
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT Papers.paperID
FROM Papers
JOIN Authorship ON Papers.paperID = Authorship.paperID
WHERE Authorship.authOrder = 2

records.gold_sql:
SELECT papers.paperid FROM papers

JOIN authors ON authorship.authid = authors.authid
WHERE authors.fname = 'Brent' AND authors.lname = 'Yorgey'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT Papers.paperID
FROM Papers
JOIN Authorship ON Papers.paperID = Authorship.paperID
JOIN Authors ON Authorship.authID = Authors.authID
WHERE Authors.fname = 'Brent' AND Authors.lname = 'Yorgey'

records.question: Which papers were authored by someone whose first name is Aaron?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT papers.paperid FROM papers
JOIN authorship ON papers.paperid = authorship.paperid
JOIN authors ON authorship.authid = authors.authid
WHERE authors.fname = 'Aaron'
records.pred_sql:

records.question: Which papers have at least 1 author affiliated with the University of Oxford?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT papers.paperid FROM papers
JOIN authorship ON papers.paperid = authorship.paperid
JOIN inst ON authorship.instid = inst.instid
WHERE inst.name = 'University of Oxford' AND authorship.authorder >= 1
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT Papers.paperID
FROM Papers
JOIN Authorship ON Papers.paperID = Authorship.paperID
JOIN Inst ON Authorship.instID = Inst.instID
WHERE Authorship.authOrder >= 1
  AND Inst.name = 'University of Oxford'

records.question: Which papers include Ralf Hinze as author number 1 or higher?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT papers.paperid FROM papers
JOIN authorship ON papers.paperid = authorship.paperid
JOIN authors ON authorship.authid = authors.authid
WHERE authors.lname = 'Hinze' AND authors.fname = 'Ralf' AND authorship.authorder >= 1
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT p.paperID
FROM Papers p
JOIN Authorship a1 ON p.paperID = a1.paperID
JOIN Authorship a2 ON p.paperID = a2.paperID
JOIN Authors au ON a2.authID = au.authID
WHERE a1.authOrder >= 1
  AND au.lname = 'Hinze'
  AND au.fname = 'Ralf'

records.question: Which papers have authors listed with an author order of at least 1?

WHERE authorship.authorder >= 1
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT Papers.paperID
FROM Papers
JOIN Authorship ON Papers.paperID = Authorship.paperID
WHERE Authorship.authOrder >= 1
